docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIGER, CHIA AS TO DEFENDANT LUGLI, FRANCESCO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIGER, CHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUGLI, FRANCESCO $174,360.76 PRINCIPAL, $630.56 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175,426.32, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
